title: YOUTH PROGRAM - 211info
text: CENTRO CULTURAL OF WASHINGTON COUNTY YOUTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers supplemental education and reinforcement of academics while providing opportunities for youth to explore new subjects through STEAM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, Mathematics) workshops and Lego Robotic groups. 1110 N Adair Street Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Grades 3-8 Hours: Registration: Monday-Friday 9am to 5:30pm Program: Saturdays 9:30am-12:30pm Email (503) 359-0446 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-0446 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $10 per month per family DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 57 to Forest Grove Services: Higher Education Awareness/Support Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Youth Enrichment Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ARTS AND CULTURE EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ESL INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRO CULTURAL OF WASHINGTON COUNTY
